subject: mounted rider on white horse holding a large hunting bird aloft, accompanied by other riders and hunting dogs
description: A noble-looking figure on horseback rides a white horse at the front of a hunting party, arm raised high to display a large bird of prey perched on their gloved hand with wings spread. The rider wears traveling clothes with a cloak. Behind them, one or two more mounted figures on a darker horse follow, alongside several hunting dogs trotting at ground level. The setting is open green countryside with a warm golden sunset sky overhead, conveying the grandeur and leisure of a noble hunt.
foreground: mounted rider on white horse with bird of prey raised on arm
background: golden sunset sky, green rolling hills, trees
